title: Ark (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ark''' may refer to:

==Canon==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Ark Roose]]''', a [[Nuknog]] [[Podracing|podracer]] who competed in the [[Boonta Eve Classic]] in [[32 BBY]].

===Miscellaneous===
*The '''[[Twi'lek Ark]]''', an artifact located on [[Ryloth]] prior to its [[Battle of Ryloth|invasion]] during the [[Clone Wars]].

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Ark Poinard]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Vice Admiral/Legends|vice admiral]] who fought in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
*'''[[Ark Roose/Legends|Ark Roose]]''', a [[Nuknog/Legends|Nuknog]] [[Podracing/Legends|podracer]] who competed in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
*'''[[Kandon Ark]]''', a member of the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] crime gang in [[3956 BBY]].
*'''[[Ark Rutendo]]''', a Human male who served with the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]].

===Miscellaneous===
*The '''[[Ryloth Ark]]''', an artifact on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] prior to its [[Battle of Ryloth/Legends|invasion]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

===Vehicles===
*'''[[Great Interplanetary Ark]]''', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], dispatched by the inhabitants of a planet to explore worlds. {{C|Ambiguously canon}}
*'''[[ARK-II series Landmaster]]''', a wheeled all-terrian vehicle.
*'''[[The Ark]]''', was a massive [[Starship/Legends|starship]] created by the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]].

==See also==
*[[Ark Angel (disambiguation)]]

{{Disambig}}
